title: feat: MCP (Model Context Protocol) — suporte a servidores externos de ferramentas

todos.task: Create internal/mcp/types.go with MCP protocol types (JsonRpcRequest, JsonRpcResponse, Tool schema)
Create internal/mcp/transport.go with Transport interface (stdio, http)
Create internal/mcp/stdio.go with stdio transport implementation
Create internal/mcp/http.go with HTTP/SSE transport implementation
Create internal/mcp/client.go with MCP client (connect, list tools, call tool)
Create internal/mcp/tool.go with MCPTool implementing tools.Tool interface
Extend TomlConfig with mcp_servers section in internal/config/profiles.go
Create internal/mcp/registry.go with helper to initialize MCP servers from config
Initialize MCP servers and register tools in cmd/devon/main.go
Create internal/mcp/mock_test.go with mock MCP server for testing
Create internal/mcp/stdio_test.go with stdio transport tests
Create internal/mcp/http_test.go with HTTP transport tests
Create internal/mcp/client_test.go with MCP client tests
Create internal/mcp/registry_test.go with MCP registry tests
Add graceful error handling for MCP connection failures (log warning, continue without MCP tools)
Create integration test with mock MCP server verifying full flow
